name: no-cross-zone-worker-sub-requests
description: Side-by-side demo: avoiding cross-zone Worker sub-requests by using Service Bindings instead of public fetch().

scripts.deploy:all: npm --workspace workers/app-region-1 run deploy && npm --workspace workers/app-region-1-next run deploy && npm --workspace workers/proxy-production-bad run deploy && npm --workspace workers/proxy-production-good run deploy && npm --workspace workers/demo-router run deploy
scripts.private:on: node scripts/toggle-private.mjs on && npm --workspace workers/app-region-1 run deploy
scripts.private:off: node scripts/toggle-private.mjs off && npm --workspace workers/app-region-1 run deploy
